vocab.word: put one foot before the other
vocab.meaning: kiên trì đi bộ hoặc tiến bước (thường khi mệt mỏi)
vocab.example: By the end of the day, I was so exhausted that I just had to focus on putting one foot before the other to get home.

vocab.meaning: đi bộ cực kỳ chậm chạp
vocab.example: I enjoy walking through the park at a snail's pace just to soak in the scenery and clear my mind.

vocab.word: a hop, skip and a jump
vocab.meaning: khoảng cách rất gần (chỉ vài bước chân)
vocab.example: I walk to work every day since my office is just a hop, skip and a jump away from my apartment.

vocab.word: take a stroll down memory lane
vocab.meaning: đi dạo để ôn lại kỷ niệm (nghĩa bóng lẫn nghĩa đen)
vocab.example: Sometimes I walk through my old neighborhood just to take a stroll down memory lane and see how things have changed.

vocab.meaning: đi đứng/hành xử một cách nghiêm túc, cẩn trọng
vocab.example: When I'm walking in busy traffic areas, I really have to walk the chalk line to ensure I stay safe on the narrow pavements.

vocab.meaning: bắt đầu đi bộ một cách ổn định và thoải mái (vào guồng)
vocab.example: It usually takes me about ten minutes to hit my stride during my morning power walk.

vocab.meaning: thanh toán hóa đơn (dùng ẩn dụ cho việc chọn đi bộ thay vì trả tiền taxi)
vocab.example: I’d rather walk for thirty minutes than foot the bill for an expensive Uber ride during rush hour.

vocab.meaning: đi đứng rón rén/cẩn trọng (thường dùng khi đi bộ ở nơi yên tĩnh/trơn trượt)
vocab.example: The museum was so quiet that I felt like I was treading on eggshells as I walked through the galleries.

vocab.word: keep one's feet on the ground
vocab.meaning: giữ đôi chân trên mặt đất (vừa nghĩa đen đi bộ, vừa nghĩa bóng là thực tế)
vocab.example: Walking to work instead of taking a luxury car helps me keep my feet on the ground and stay connected to my community.

vocab.meaning: mọi lúc, mọi nơi trong suốt quãng đường đi
vocab.example: My dog accompanies me on my evening walks, staying right by my side every step of the way.
